ogTitle: Seahampton vs Seal Rocks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seahampton and Seal Rocks.
heading: Seahampton vs Seal Rocks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seahampton, New South Wales and Seal Rocks, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seal Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Seahampton (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seahampton or Seal Rocks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seahampton has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Seal Rocks scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seahampton scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Seal Rocks scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seahampton or Seal Rocks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seal Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
